cards.name: La Original Paleteria y Neveria
cards.address: 273 Willow St, San Jose, CA 95120, USA
cards.blurb: Kick off the morning with a paleta or a creamy nieve — a low-key, delicious way to ease into the day before the heat picks up.
cards.why: It's the kind of spot locals actually go to, not just pass by.

cards.name: San Jose Municipal Rose Garden
cards.address: Municipal Rose Garden
cards.blurb: Walk the rows of blooms and take your time — April is peak season here and the garden is genuinely stunning right now.
cards.why: Perfect weather for a slow morning stroll outside before your 11 AM stop.

cards.name: San Pedro Square Market
cards.address: 87 N San Pedro St, San Jose, CA 95110, USA
cards.blurb: Grab a treat at Swana Sweets and hang out in the Student Union outdoor area for a bit.
cards.why: It's a fun, casual stop with good energy on campus.

cards.name: Triton Museum of Art
cards.address: 1505 Warburton Ave, Santa Clara, CA 95050, USA
cards.blurb: Wander through the galleries and spend some time in the sculpture garden outside. It's free and genuinely worth a couple hours.
cards.why: It closes at 4 PM so this is the sweet spot to go — enough time to actually enjoy it.

cards.name: Peet's Coffee
cards.address: 1110 Blossom Hill Rd #20, San Jose, CA 95118, USA
cards.blurb: Swing by Peet's for a proper lunch break coffee and something to snack on while you regroup for the afternoon.
cards.why: A solid mid-day reset before heading into the afternoon.

cards.name: Be Ready: Be Prepared for Disasters
cards.blurb: Drop into this free community workshop on disaster preparedness — practical stuff that's actually useful to know.
cards.why: Free, low-commitment, and the kind of thing you keep meaning to do but never get around to.

cards.name: Emelina's 2
cards.address: 2325 El Camino Real, Santa Clara, CA 95050, USA
cards.blurb: Head to Emelina's 2 for a solid dinner. Try the local Mexican favorites and settle in for a relaxed, affordable meal to close out the day.
cards.why: Great food at a price that won't hurt, and it's open late enough to not feel rushed.

cards.name: Swana Sweets at Student Union
cards.blurb: Join us for “SWANA Sweets”, a community gathering to celebrate the start of Southwest Asian & North African (SWANA) Heritage Month! We’ll have yummy SWANA desserts and snacks and a collaborative &…
cards.why: You picked this one.

cards.name: Voltaire Coffee Roasters
cards.address: 360 S Market St #80, San Jose, CA 95113, USA
cards.blurb: Grab a coffee and decompress after the talk. Voltaire is a proper specialty roaster, so skip the drip and get something they're proud of.
cards.why: Good coffee after a morning talk is non-negotiable.

cards.name: Triton Museum of Art
cards.address: 1505 Warburton Ave, Santa Clara, CA 95050, USA
cards.blurb: Wander the Triton's galleries and don't skip the sculpture garden out back — it's free and genuinely impressive for a local museum.
cards.why: Free contemporary art on a mild Thursday morning with almost no crowds is hard to beat.

cards.name: San Pedro Square Market
cards.address: 87 N San Pedro St, San Jose, CA 95110, USA
cards.blurb: Hit the San Pedro Square Market and mix and match lunch from whatever's calling you — tacos, banh mi, ramen, or all three if you're feeling ambitious. Grab a patio seat if the afternoon sun holds.
cards.why: No pressure on what to order and no one table to commit to makes this the perfect loose lunch stop.

cards.name: Art and Craft Workshops
cards.address: 255 N Market St #270, San Jose, CA 95110, USA
cards.blurb: Drop into the Art and Craft Workshops space and see what's running — it's the kind of place where you can make something with your hands and leave with an actual object instead of just a memory.
cards.why: After a morning of thinking big thoughts about limits, making something tangible is a satisfying flip.

cards.name: Hapa's Brewing Company
cards.address: 460 Lincoln Ave #90, San Jose, CA 95126, USA
cards.blurb: Wind down at Hapa's Brewing with a pint or two. It's a laid-back neighborhood taproom, so pull up a stool and let the day settle.
cards.why: A good local brewery is the right ending to a day that started with a philosophy talk.

cards.name: Spark60: Meditations for Mortals: The Liberating Art of Embracing Your Limits with Oliver Burkeman
cards.blurb: Looking for a spark of inspiration? Spark60 is your monthly passport to big ideas and bestselling thinkers. In this edition, hear from Oliver Burkeman .
cards.why: You picked this one.

cards.name: Patient No More Exhibition at King Library
cards.blurb: Wander through the Patient No More Exhibition at King Library — it's free, it's already open, and it's a genuinely cool way to start the morning with some thought-provoking art.
cards.why: Free art on a crisp morning is hard to beat as a first move.

cards.name: San Pedro Square Market
cards.address: 87 N San Pedro St, San Jose, CA 95110, USA
cards.blurb: Head to San Pedro Square Market and mix and match lunch from the vendors. Tacos, banh mi, ramen, a coffee. Grab a patio seat if the sun stays out.
cards.why: It's downtown, it's a Thursday, and having options at lunch is always the right call.

cards.name: Student Art Showcase at King Library
cards.blurb: The Student Art Showcase is right there in King Library, so roll through it while you're already in the building and see what SJSU students have been working on.
cards.why: Same building, different show, and it fills the morning without any effort.

cards.name: Alum Rock Park
cards.address: 15350 Penitencia Creek Rd, San Jose, CA 95127, USA
cards.blurb: Drive out to Alum Rock Park and do a trail through the foothills. The creek paths are peaceful and the elevation gives you some solid views without killing your legs.
cards.why: The weather hits 72°F today, which is exactly what you want for a hillside walk.

cards.name: Bamboo Healthcare Spa Inc
cards.address: 871 Coleman Ave, San Jose, CA 95110, USA
cards.blurb: Stop into Bamboo Healthcare Spa for a quick massage or treatment before the afternoon wraps up. A good reset after a morning of walking around.
cards.why: An hour of this before an evening event is genuinely a good idea.

cards.name: In-Person English Language Learner (ELL) Conversation Club
cards.blurb: Friday Fun: Legos® Fun — this is your locked event, so show up and get into it.
cards.why: It's on the calendar, it's happening.

cards.name: Home Eat汉家宴 - San Jose
cards.address: 88 S 4th St STE 150, San Jose, CA 95112, USA
cards.blurb: End the day at Home Eat 汉家宴 for dinner. The rating speaks for itself, but the food is the kind of homestyle Chinese cooking that's worth planning around.
cards.why: A proper sit-down dinner caps the day off right and you're already in the downtown area.

cards.name: Friday Fun : Legos® Fun
cards.blurb: Join us every Friday at the Willow Glen Branch Library for a fun activity for kids. Activities may include arts & crafts, special performances or workshops, and board or video games. Note: 2nd Friday…
cards.why: You picked this one.

cards.name: Tea Top Milpitas
cards.address: 82 Ranch Dr, Milpitas, CA 95035, USA
cards.blurb: Start the morning with a bubble tea or milk tea from Tea Top — grab something warm and settle in before the day picks up.
cards.why: Good way to ease into a Thursday without overthinking it.

cards.name: Augustus Rathbone Park
cards.address: 393 Expedition Ln, Milpitas, CA 95035, USA
cards.blurb: Take a short walk through Augustus Rathbone Park to stretch your legs and enjoy the cool morning air before your commitment.
cards.why: Perfect weather to be outside right now, before it warms up.

cards.name: Qi Gong Meditation & Exercise Class at Milpitas Library
cards.blurb: Mend with Friends is your locked item here — bring something that needs fixing and enjoy the community hang.
cards.why: A chill, low-key midday activity that doesn't feel like an errand.

cards.name: Magitek Games
cards.address: 1122 Cadillac Ct, Milpitas, CA 95035, USA
cards.blurb: Swing by Magitek Games in Milpitas for tabletop browsing, casual gaming, or just poking around their selection — the kind of place you lose an hour without trying.
cards.why: A fun, unhurried way to spend the afternoon with no agenda.

cards.name: Qi Gong Meditation & Exercise Class at Milpitas Library
cards.blurb: Head back to Milpitas Library for the Qi Gong Meditation and Exercise Class. It's a gentle, grounding hour of movement and breathing — no experience needed.
cards.why: Free, calm, and a genuinely nice way to spend a Thursday afternoon.

cards.name: Massage Envy
cards.address: 581 E Calaveras Blvd, Milpitas, CA 95035, USA
cards.blurb: Wind down at Massage Envy in Milpitas with a massage or stretch session to cap off the day right.
cards.why: Honestly, Thursday evenings are underrated for self-care and this place is open late enough to make it work.

cards.name: Mend with Friends
cards.blurb: Do you have... ...a stuffed animal with the stuffing leaking out? ...a shirt with a missing button? ...a hole you want to patch? ...a stain you want to cover up? Bring it to the Mend with Friends…
cards.why: You picked this one.

cards.name: Alegio Chocolaté / Claudio Corallo PALO ALTO
cards.address: 522 Bryant St, Palo Alto, CA 94301, USA
cards.blurb: Start the morning with a stop at Alegio Chocolaté — grab a single-origin drinking chocolate or a few bonbons to kick things off right.
cards.why: It's one of the best chocolate spots in the Bay Area and a perfect low-key morning treat.

cards.name: Spotlight Tours Thursdays | Anderson Collection
cards.address: 314 Lomita Dr, Stanford, CA 94305
cards.blurb: Join the free Thursday Spotlight Tour at the Anderson Collection and get an insider walkthrough of some seriously great American modern and contemporary art.
cards.why: It's a genuinely good way to see the collection with context instead of just wandering.

cards.name: The Dish Trail
cards.address: Stanford Foothills (Stanford Ave trailhead)
cards.blurb: Head straight to the Dish Trail from Stanford and do the full loop — the views of the Bay and hills are wide open and the climb is totally worth it.
cards.why: 72°F with barely any rain chance makes this about as good a hiking day as you'll get.

cards.name: Tamarine Restaurant & Gallery
cards.address: 546 University Ave, Palo Alto, CA 94301, USA
cards.blurb: Post-hike lunch at Tamarine on University Ave. Order something from their Vietnamese small plates menu and sit in the gallery space.
cards.why: It's a solid mid-range lunch spot that won't feel rushed after a good morning outdoors.

cards.name: Cantor Arts Center
cards.address: Cantor Arts Center, Stanford University
cards.blurb: Walk through Cantor Arts Center and spend time in both the indoor galleries and the outdoor Rodin sculpture garden — the Gates of Hell never gets old.
cards.why: It's free and legitimately world-class, the kind of place you keep meaning to get back to.

cards.name: 1,000 Ways to Hold: A New Work By Erika Chong Shuch
cards.address: 314 Lomita Dr, Stanford, CA 94305
cards.blurb: Catch the Erika Chong Shuch performance at 314 Lomita Dr on Stanford campus — it's a new work and the kind of thing you can walk into without any prep.
cards.why: Free, today only, and genuinely different from anything else on the list.

cards.name: Roja Los Altos
cards.address: 242 State St, Los Altos, CA 94022, USA
cards.blurb: Wrap the night with dinner at Roja in Los Altos. Settle in at the bar or grab a table and work through some cocktails and their Mexican-inspired menu.
cards.why: It's a great dinner spot to wind down a full day.

cards.name: Drop-In Drawing @ The Anderson
cards.address: 314 Lomita Dr, Stanford, CA 94305
cards.blurb: Join us for sketching in the galleries every 2nd and 4th Fridays! This free drop-in activity provides all skill levels with a chance to experiment with pencils and paper while getting the opportunity…
cards.why: You picked this one.

cards.name: Caffe Stellato
cards.address: 435 Emerson St, Palo Alto, CA 94301, USA
cards.blurb: Start the morning with coffee and something to eat at Caffe Stellato — grab a seat and ease into the day before heading to campus.
cards.why: Good coffee and a relaxed vibe is the right way to kick off a Thursday.

cards.name: 1,000 Ways to Hold: A New Work By Erika Chong Shuch
cards.address: 314 Lomita Dr, Stanford, CA 94305
cards.blurb: Catch this new performance work by Erika Chong Shuch at Stanford — it's the kind of intimate, physical theater that sticks with you long after you leave.
cards.why: It's free, it's happening today, and you'll be glad you went.

cards.name: Spotlight Tours Thursdays | Anderson Collection
cards.address: 314 Lomita Dr, Stanford, CA 94305
cards.blurb: Walk over to the Anderson Collection for the Thursday Spotlight Tour — a focused, guided look at some of the best pieces in the collection without spending half the day there.
cards.why: Free guided tours are rare and this one's genuinely worth the hour.

cards.name: Mediterranean Wraps
cards.address: 433 California Ave, Palo Alto, CA 94306, USA
cards.blurb: Head to Mediterranean Wraps on California Ave for a quick, satisfying lunch — fresh wraps, solid falafel, nothing fussy.
cards.why: It's cheap, fast, and exactly what you want between a morning of culture and an afternoon hike.

cards.name: The Dish Trail
cards.address: Stanford Foothills (Stanford Ave trailhead)
cards.blurb: Work off lunch on The Dish Trail — the loop gives you wide open views of the Bay and the hills, and the weather today is perfect for it at a high of 72.
cards.why: Crisp morning air will have cleared out by mid-afternoon and you'll have the trail in great conditions.

cards.name: W Spa
cards.address: 441 Waverley St, Palo Alto, CA 94301, USA
cards.blurb: Clean up the afternoon with a stop at W Spa on Waverley — even a shorter treatment or a quick wind-down session is worth it before a night out.
cards.why: Going into a baseball game relaxed beats going in tired.

cards.name: Stanford Cardinal Baseball vs. Santa Clara Broncos Baseball
cards.address: 151 Sam McDonald Mall
cards.blurb: Check out Stanford Cardinal Baseball vs. Santa Clara Broncos Baseball.
cards.why: You picked this one.

cards.name: Arwa Yemeni Coffee
cards.address: 605 Tasman Dr, Sunnyvale, CA 94089, USA
cards.blurb: Start the morning with a coffee at Arwa Yemeni Coffee — Yemeni coffee culture is its own thing, so let them show you what that means.
cards.why: A genuinely different coffee experience to kick off the day.

cards.name: Toddler Time
cards.blurb: Alphabet Soup is on at 10:00 — head in and see what the morning session has going on.
cards.why: It's free, it's local, and it gets you out and moving early.

cards.name: Computer History Museum
cards.address: 1401 N Shoreline Blvd, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA
cards.blurb: The Computer History Museum is genuinely wild even if tech isn't your thing — walk through the full arc of computing history, from room-sized machines to the stuff in your pocket.
cards.why: Two hours here goes fast and you'll come out knowing something you didn't before.

cards.name: Simply Sabor
cards.address: 340 Castro St, Mountain View, CA 94041, USA
cards.blurb: Grab lunch at Simply Sabor on Castro Street and try whatever their daily specials are — this place punches well above its weight.
cards.why: One of the best-loved spots on Castro and a solid midday stop.

cards.name: Shoreline Park & Lake
cards.address: Shoreline at Mountain View
cards.blurb: Walk or bike along the waterfront at Shoreline Park. The weather hits 71°F this afternoon, so get out on the trail and watch the bay do its thing.
cards.why: Perfect afternoon temperature for being outside without breaking a sweat.

cards.name: 2026 Fellow Awards Ceremony
cards.address: 1401 N Shoreline Blvd, Mountain View
cards.blurb: The 2026 Fellow Awards Ceremony is happening today at 1401 N Shoreline Blvd. Dress it up a little and go see who's being recognized in the tech and arts world.
cards.why: Not a bad way to spend an evening — some ceremony, some people-watching.

cards.name: Bar Underdog
cards.address: 299 California Ave #110, Palo Alto, CA 94306, USA
cards.blurb: Wind down at Bar Underdog in Palo Alto with drinks and whatever catches your eye on the menu. It's a late evening kind of spot with good energy and a solid bar program.
cards.why: Great place to close out a full Thursday without calling it a night too early.

cards.name: Alphabet Soup
cards.blurb: Specially trained staff present stories, songs, and activities that lay the foundation your child needs to get ready to read. Designed for ages 2-5, and their caregivers. Grow a Reader Holiday…
cards.why: You picked this one.

cards.name: Spark60: Meditations for Mortals: The Liberating Art of Embracing Your Limits with Oliver Burkeman
cards.blurb: Catch this free morning talk with Oliver Burkeman on embracing your limits — it's the kind of thing that actually sticks with you for the rest of the day.
cards.why: Starting the morning with something that makes you think is a solid move.

cards.name: Triton Museum of Art
cards.address: 1505 Warburton Ave, Santa Clara, CA 95050, USA
cards.blurb: Wander through the Triton's contemporary exhibitions and spend some time in the sculpture garden out back. Free admission, zero pressure, genuinely good art.
cards.why: It's the most underrated art spot in the South Bay and a perfect morning stretch.

cards.name: Pav Bhaji and More Santa Clara
cards.address: 2695 El Camino Real, Santa Clara, CA 95051, USA
cards.blurb: Grab lunch at Pav Bhaji and More on El Camino — order the pav bhaji and let it do its thing.
cards.why: A 4.8 rating means the food earns it every time.

cards.name: AI-Powered tools to help with your searching
cards.blurb: Drop into this free session on AI-powered job search tools. Whether you're actively looking or just curious, the practical tips are worth the hour.
cards.why: Free, useful, and it's happening right now today.

cards.name: Computer History Museum
cards.address: 1401 N Shoreline Blvd, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA
cards.blurb: Hit the Computer History Museum for the last stretch of the afternoon. Walk the main exhibit hall and let the sheer scale of computing history sink in.
cards.why: Even if you're not a tech person, this place has a way of pulling you in.

cards.name: California Momo Kitchen
cards.address: 913 E Duane Ave, Sunnyvale, CA 94085, USA
cards.blurb: Dinner at California Momo Kitchen in Sunnyvale. Get the momos, obviously, and try whatever the house special sauce situation is.
cards.why: It's a local gem that punches well above its price point.
